form.formComment: Last start 7th of 14 at Sirinyer in G3 on March 29 over 1700m, on a wet track; 10 len behind Kralin Dansi carrying 58kg at $11.40. The race before that 3rd in a small field at this track on February 20 over 1200m, 2 len behind Tolper with 58kg at $1.40. Will need to find plenty of improvement.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after two months came from midfield and won by 0.8 len at this track March 26 over 1400m defeating Secret Flight carrying 56kg at $4.25. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at this track on December 11 over 1600m, 18 len behind Markhor carrying 57kg at $3.35. Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 7 at this track on March 27 over 1400m, 0.4 len behind Moment Saver carrying 60.5kg at $2.05. The race before that 4th in a small field at this track on March 19 over 1400m, 6 len behind Hard Runner with 58kg at $15.05. Narrowly missed last start and is a top chance again.

form.formComment: Comes off a 41 day let-up. Last start 2nd in a small field at Osmangazi All Weather on March 6 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Sharp Storm carrying 55kg at $2.70. The start before that second last of 8 at this track in G2 on February 15 over 1400m, 10 len behind Hardox carrying 58kg at $9.75. Wasn?t too far off the mark last time. In the mix again.
